title: Evangelion Title Vectors
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion Title Vectors?             Quote Post by ApolloIVtv » Fri Nov 08, 2013 8:09 pm Does anyone have or know where I can find Evangelion title vectors? Specifically this one: I just need the Neon Genesis Evangelion part. I would do it myself, but I don't have photoshop or any of the sorts in order to vector it (and I already used up my PS6 free trial). If anyone has a recommended software (that's free) that can do this, then I'm all ears. If not, hopefully one of you could do it, if you can. That'll be of much help to me. I need the title for an Eva AMV/Trailer fan thing, in case your wondering.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Nov 08, 2013 8:41 pm Why do you need vectors? It's just a an arrangement of common fonts, man. Pretty sure most of it is Bell MT, maybe some form of Futura for the bottom.

[]:             Quote Post by ApolloIVtv » Fri Nov 08, 2013 8:46 pm Authenticity, maybe? Although, yes, fonts are easier. I would've asked but I didn't think there were any similar. I'll try Bell MT.

Article: Evangelion Title Vectors
[]: Evangelion Title Vectors?             Quote Post by ApolloIVtv » Fri Nov 08, 2013 8:09 pm Does anyone have or know where I can find Evangelion title vectors? Specifically this one: I just need the Neon Genesis Evangelion part. I would do it myself, but I don't have photoshop or any of the sorts in order to vector it (and I already used up my PS6 free trial). If anyone has a recommended software (that's free) that can do this, then I'm all ears. If not, hopefully one of you could do it, if you can. That'll be of much help to me. I need the title for an Eva AMV/Trailer fan thing, in case your wondering.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Nov 08, 2013 8:41 pm Why do you need vectors? It's just a an arrangement of common fonts, man. Pretty sure most of it is Bell MT, maybe some form of Futura for the bottom.

[]:             Quote Post by ApolloIVtv » Fri Nov 08, 2013 8:46 pm Authenticity, maybe? Although, yes, fonts are easier. I would've asked but I didn't think there were any similar. I'll try Bell MT.
